visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) Two young women are sitting on a light-colored sofa in a bright living room. One woman is wearing a black long-sleeved shirt and holding an egg-shaped plush pillow, while the other wears a beige sweatshirt and points excitedly towards another room. (2) The scene cuts to a kitchen sink where several white ceramic plates and spoons are stained with reddish-orange sauce and scattered leftovers. (3) One woman holds up a clear bottle labeled 'Goodies & Co.' with a black pump, showing it to the camera in a medium close-up. (4) Close-up shots follow, showing hands using a yellow sponge to create white foam and scrub the dirty plates clean. (5) The woman in black then washes fresh red apples and yellow bell peppers in a white plastic strainer under running water in the sink. (6) Both women stand together in the kitchen; the woman in black holds a sparkling clean white plate, and the woman in beige presents a cardboard box containing three spray bottles while talking.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 欸欸 我跟你講. [Subtitle]: 你家好像有髒東西. (2) [Variety]: !?. [Subtitle]: 幹嘛我才搬新家. [Subtitle]: 不要嚇我. (3) [Subtitle]: 有啊 在廚房那裡. [Subtitle]: 哪裡啦. (4) [Variety]: 髒碗盤. [Subtitle]: 不就是一堆髒碗盤. (5) [Subtitle]: 會怕還不洗哦. [Slogan]: 超好用入厝禮. (6) [Slogan]: Goodies & Co. 二合一蔬果碗盤清潔劑. (7) [Subtitle]: 天然的咖啡渣製作而成. [Subtitle]: 添加義大利特級橄欖皂液. (8) [Subtitle]: 能有效去除盤上的油汙髒汙. [Subtitle]: 除臭劑柿單寧. (9) [Subtitle]: 輕鬆去除異味不殘留. [Subtitle]: 髒的鍋碗瓢盆都能洗的乾乾淨淨. (10) [Subtitle]: 有欸 馬上就亮晶晶. [Variety]: 很傷手. (11) [Slogan]: 中性植萃配方. [Subtitle]: 連蔬果都可以洗哦. (12) [Subtitle]: 還有保養品等級的甘油成分. [Subtitle]: 呵護雙手肌膚. (13) [Slogan]: 用起來更安心. [Subtitle]: 淡淡的蘋果香味. (14) [Slogan]: 愛上洗碗就靠它. [Slogan]: 神奇萬用清潔劑 & 地板清潔劑 & 水垢清潔劑. (15) [Variety]: 關我什麼事.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female characters appearing throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman has dark hair with bangs and wears a black sweater and khaki pants. The second woman has her hair in a bun and wears a beige matching sweatshirt and sweatpants set.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The video starts in a minimalist living room with a white sofa and plain walls. It transitions to a modern kitchen with a white countertop, a stainless steel sink, and light wood cabinetry.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy female conversation starts immediately, accompanied by a bright, rhythmic acoustic guitar and light drum beat. (2) A subtle whoosh sound effect punctuates the transition as the speakers move. (3) The rhythmic splashing of water and the light clinking of dishes become audible under the dialogue and music. (4) Soft popping sound effects simulate the noise of soap bubbles during the close-up washing scenes. (5) The voices remain upbeat and enthusiastic, maintaining a constant flow of information with minimal pauses. (6) A short, comical 'ding' or cartoonish emphasis sound effect triggers when variety text appears on screen.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Conflict/Pain Point -> Demonstration -> Feature Breakdown -> Reward/CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to promote Goodies & Co. cleaning products as an ideal housewarming gift. It uses a comedic dialogue between two friends about 'dirty things' (dirty dishes) in a new home to naturally introduce a high-quality, eco-friendly dish and produce soap. It emphasizes safety for skin, fruit/vegetable washing, and pleasant scent.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct display of product branding, detailed explanation of ingredients, and presentation of a gift set.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video effectively blends social-style banter with a product infomercial structure, making the endorsement feel personal and accessible.
